prd.oneLiner: Connect client preferences with listings, viewing and consultation history, contract stages, and sales performance.
prd.goal: Increase inquiry-to-viewing conversion by 15% and reduce missed follow-ups.
prd.whyNow: Client preferences, listing data, viewing schedules, and consultation notes are spread across tools, delaying matching and follow-up.
prd.problem: Client preferences, listing data, viewing schedules, and consultation notes are spread across tools, delaying matching and follow-up.
prd.solution: Connect client preferences with listings, viewing and consultation history, contract stages, and sales performance.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Agent managing property inquiries and clients
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Client preferences, listing data, viewing schedules, and consultation notes are spread across tools, delaying matching and follow-up.

targets.name: Real estate sales operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Client preferences, listing data, viewing schedules, and consultation notes are spread across tools, delaying matching and follow-up.

scenarios.text: Agent managing property inquiries and clients completes property inquiry and client-preference capture and checks progress.
Real estate sales operations coordinator reviews inquiry source, viewing conversion, and contract-performance reporting by listing.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Increase inquiry-to-viewing conversion by 15% and reduce missed follow-ups.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Client preference, listing, viewing, and contract-status lookup
Listing matching, viewing scheduling, follow-up consultation, and contract-progress management
Inquiry source, viewing conversion, and contract-performance reporting by listing
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
